summary: API Playground frontend testing completed. All features working correctly. Fixed 1 bug where 'Trigger Human Approval' scenario was incorrectly showing 'Spend Denied' due to policy limit mismatch.

bugs_fixed.issue: 'Trigger Human Approval' scenario showed 'Spend Denied' instead of 'Pending Human Approval'
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Policy per_transaction_limit_cents was 10000 ($100) but scenario amount was 30000 ($300), causing denial before reaching human approval check
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated per_transaction_limit_cents from 10000 to 50000 ($500) and daily_limit_cents from 50000 to 100000 ($1000) to allow $300 transactions to pass and trigger human approval flow

tests: Submit a Spend Request - form pre-fills correctly
Create an Escrow Account - works correctly
Set a Spending Policy - works correctly
Trigger a Denial - shows failed rules in Plain English
Trigger Human Approval - shows pending approval status (after fix)
Plain English tab shows human-readable explanation
Approved spend shows checkmark and remaining balance
Denied spend shows failed rules with X marks
Pending approval shows hourglass and approval ID
Demo Mode button selected by default
Live Mode button shows API key input field
Connect button visible in Live Mode
Categories are collapsible (Escrow Accounts, Spending Policies, etc.)
Endpoints show method badges (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE)
Hero section has 'Try the API Playground' button
Welcome overlay shows on first visit
Demo Mode indicator in status bar

mocked_api_note: Demo Mode uses client-side simulation (simulateDemoRequest function) - not real API calls. This is by design for the public playground.
context_for_next_testing_agent: API Playground fully tested. All 8 Quick Scenarios work correctly. Fixed policy limits bug that was causing 'Trigger Human Approval' to show denial instead of pending approval. Demo Mode simulation working correctly with Pretty/Plain English response tabs. Navbar and landing page CTAs navigate to /playground correctly.
